school.name: Pinnacle Academy
school.tagline: Nurturing Future Leaders Through Excellence in Education

vision_mission.vision: To be the leading institution fostering intellectual excellence, character development, and global citizenship.
vision_mission.mission: We provide a rigorous, nurturing, and inclusive educational environment that empowers students to achieve academic excellence, develop critical thinking, and become responsible global citizens.

programs.name: Primary School
programs.focus: Building strong foundations in literacy, numeracy, and critical thinking

programs.name: Middle School
programs.focus: Holistic development with emphasis on experiential learning

academic.name: Central Library
academic.details: 50,000+ books, digital resources, online database access

academic.name: Science Laboratories
academic.details: Physics, Chemistry, Biology with advanced equipment

academic.name: Computer Labs
academic.details: 3 labs with 90+ systems, high-speed internet, coding courses, robotics lab

faq.question: What is the age requirement for Grade 1 admission?
faq.answer: Students must be 6 years old as of April 1st of the admission year. We require an entrance test in English and Mathematics, and basic reading and number recognition skills.

faq.question: What is the fee structure and payment schedule?
faq.answer: Annual fees range from ₹5,00,000 to ₹7,75,000 depending on grade level. Fees can be paid in 3 installments: June, September, and January. Sibling discounts of 10% are available. Additional costs include uniform, books, activities, and transport.

faq.question: Is transportation provided?
faq.answer: Yes, we provide GPS-enabled transport with trained drivers covering multiple routes covering the city. Transportation fee varies by zone. All buses have safety features and trained staff. Parents can track buses in real-time through our mobile app.

faq.question: What are the board options available?
faq.answer: We follow ICSE and ISC boards for Classes 1-12. IGCSE options are also available for Grade 10 and 12 students. All board curricula emphasize academic excellence and holistic development.

faq.question: What sports and extracurricular activities are offered?
faq.answer: We offer cricket, badminton, basketball, tennis, volleyball, and athletics. Extracurricular activities include music, dance, drama, visual arts, coding, robotics, debates, and social service programs. Participation is compulsory for character building.

faq.question: How is campus safety ensured?
faq.answer: Campus is secured with CCTV surveillance, trained security staff, and restricted entry. We have emergency protocols, first-aid facilities, and regular safety drills. All staff undergo background verification and training.

faq.question: What is the school's approach to technology integration?
faq.answer: We have interactive smart classrooms, digital learning platforms, coding labs, and AI/robotics programs. Every classroom has smart boards and online learning management system. Students learn digital literacy and cybersecurity.

faq.question: How do you support different learning needs?
faq.answer: We have a dedicated inclusion team for students with learning differences. Individualized Education Plans (IEPs) are created. We offer speech therapy, occupational therapy, and counseling services. Teacher assistants are available in classrooms.

faq.question: What is the university placement record?
faq.answer: Our Class 12 students achieve 98% university placement. Students get admitted to top Indian colleges and international universities including IITs, Delhi University, Mumbai University, and overseas institutions. Average scholarship rate: 35%.

faq.question: How often are parents updated about student progress?
faq.answer: We conduct parent-teacher meetings twice a year. Regular progress reports are shared through parent portal every term. Urgent issues are communicated immediately. Weekly newsletters update families about school events and academic progress.

faq.question: What is the student-teacher ratio?
faq.answer: Average student-teacher ratio is 1:12, ensuring personalized attention and quality education. This varies by grade level but never exceeds 1:15.

faq.question: Do you offer any scholarships?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer merit-based scholarships for academically excellent students. Financial aid programs are also available based on need. Parents should contact the admissions office for detailed information.

faq.question: What are the school timings?
faq.answer: Regular school hours are 8:30 AM to 3:30 PM. After-school care is available until 5:30 PM. Counselor is available from 10 AM to 1 PM. Library remains open from 7:30 AM to 5:00 PM.

faq.question: How can I apply for admission?
faq.answer: You can apply online through our website or visit the admissions office. Application window typically opens in July. Required documents include birth certificate, previous school records, and passport-sized photographs.

faq.question: What happens after I submit my application?
faq.answer: After submission, you will receive a confirmation email. Entrance exams are scheduled based on the grade you're applying for. Interviews follow exam results. Final admission decisions are announced within 2-3 weeks of interview.

responseTemplates.greeting: Welcome to Pinnacle Academy! How can I assist you today?
responseTemplates.admissionsHelp: I can help you with admissions information. Would you like to know about our entry requirements, fee structure, or application process?
responseTemplates.academicsHelp: I can provide information about our academic programs, curriculum, and boards offered. What would you like to know?
responseTemplates.facilitiesHelp: We have excellent facilities including sports complexes, labs, and libraries. What facility information do you need?
responseTemplates.contactHelp: You can reach us at +91-40-4000-5000 or email info@pinnacle.edu. Is there anything specific you'd like to know?
responseTemplates.calendarHelp: Our academic year runs from June to April. Would you like to know about term dates, holidays, or examination schedule?
responseTemplates.notFound: I'm not sure I understand that. Could you please rephrase your question?
responseTemplates.fallback: That's a great question. For specific details, please contact our admissions team at +91-40-4000-5050 or admissions@pinnacle.edu
